description: Shipyard plugin hooks for cross-session project enforcement

hooks.command: _R="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"; if [ -z "$_R" ]; then echo "shipyard: CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT is unset; skipping session-guard" >&2; exit 0; fi; bash "$_R/hooks/session-guard.sh"
_R="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"; if [ -z "$_R" ]; then echo "shipyard: CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT is unset; skipping secret-guard" >&2; exit 0; fi; bash "$_R/hooks/secret-guard.sh"
_R="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"; if [ -z "$_R" ]; then echo "shipyard: CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT is unset; skipping secret-guard" >&2; exit 0; fi; bash "$_R/hooks/secret-guard.sh"
